name: Oravox Cove
description: Elite active noise-cancelling earbuds delivering immersive studio acoustics, high-resolution wireless streaming, and ergonomic security for active life.
features: Hybrid ANC up to 45dB with dynamic ambient pass-through mode
High-Res Wireless Audio with LDAC & AAC codec support
Smart touch controls with customizable gestures via app
IPX7 waterproof and sweat-resistant nanocoating
Up to 36 hours of total battery life with wireless charging case

reviews.name: Sarah Miller
reviews.comment: The active noise cancellation is stunning. Easily blocks out subway noise and the sound signature is incredibly warm.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.comment: Exceptional treble clarity. Battery life is solid and wireless charging is super convenient. Highly recommend.

name: Oravox Drift
description: Rugged waterproof outdoor bluetooth speaker with dual passive radiators, 360-degree acoustic dispersion, and a robust shockproof aluminum shell.
features: IP67 Dustproof and Waterproof structure (submersible)
360-degree omnidirectional sound with deep acoustic waveguide
24 hours of non-stop battery life on a single charge
PartyConnect stereo pairing with up to 100 speakers
Custom woven structural nylon strap with carabiner clip

reviews.name: Marcus Chen
reviews.comment: Took it on a camping trip in the rain. Sounded crisp, got wet, and had zero issues. The bass response is incredible for its size.

name: Oravox Thread
description: High-resolution wired in-ear monitors for audiophiles, featuring custom dual-balanced armature drivers and a silver-plated oxygen-free copper detachable cable.
features: Hybrid driver layout: Dual Balanced Armatures + Single Dynamic Driver
Premium detachable MMCX silver-plated braided copper cable
Hand-polished medical-grade acoustic resin shell
Professional-grade sound isolation up to 26dB
Precision gold-plated 3.5mm low-impedance termination plug

reviews.name: Johnathan Wood
reviews.comment: Simply stunning soundstage. You can isolate every instrument. Detail retrieval is rivaling headphones twice its price.

name: Oravox Halo
description: Ultra-premium wireless over-ear headphones with adaptive active noise cancellation, custom beryllium drivers, and breathable sheepskin leather ear pads.
features: Fully adaptive Hybrid ANC using six premium sensing microphones
40mm custom-engineered beryllium dome dynamic drivers
Genuine sheepskin leather and pressure-relieving memory foam pads
Stunning 45-hour battery life with ANC deactivated
High-Res wireless playback via aptX Adaptive and LDAC

specs.Battery Life: Up to 45 hours (ANC Off) / 38 hours (ANC On)

reviews.name: Elena Rostova
reviews.comment: The comfort is unmatched. I wore these on a 12-hour flight and forgot they were on my head. Sound is crystal clear, perfectly balanced.

name: Oravox Edge
description: Immersive 5.1.2 Dolby Atmos soundbar with built-in subwoofers, advanced acoustic beamforming technology, and eARC support for cinema-grade home theatre.
features: Native Dolby Atmos, DTS:X, and multi-channel audio processing
5.1.2 acoustic architecture with 11 custom-aligned speakers
Integrated dual woofers for rich bass without floor clutter
HDMI eARC configuration for seamless single-remote television operation
Wireless Apple AirPlay 2, Chromecast, and Spotify Connect integration

specs.Connectivity: HDMI eARC, Optical Input, AUX, Bluetooth 5.0
specs.Audio Formats: Dolby Atmos, Dolby Digital Plus, DTS:X, LPCM

reviews.name: Robert Vance
reviews.comment: Unbelievable projection. Movies sound huge and deep. The height channels genuinely bounce off the ceiling. Perfect minimalist setup.

name: Oravox Wrap
description: Ergonomic neckband wireless earphones built for endurance sports, featuring custom soft-silicone collar design, magnetic ear tips, and extreme battery life.
features: Flexible liquid-silicone contours that rest comfortably on the neck
Magnetic housings secure the earbuds around your chest when not in use
Up to 20 hours of continuous music on a single charge
IPX5 sweatproof and dustproof rating
Clear voice isolation utilizing Qualcomm cVc 8.0 dual microphone arrays

reviews.name: Kyle Foster
reviews.comment: Perfect for running. Standard buds always fall out of my ears, but this neckband holds them securely and the battery lasts forever.

name: Oravox Cairn
description: Ambient smart home speaker featuring an illuminated hand-blown glass acoustic dome, 360-degree sonic dispersion, and built-in voice command integration.
features: Reactive LED illuminated blown-glass dome with custom light patterns
360-degree sonic dispersing cone for room-filling acoustic performance
Dual microphones for integrated smart assistant commands
Dual-band Wi-Fi streaming with multiroom group sync capabilities
Touch-capacitive aluminum crown controls for manual operation

reviews.name: Lucia Moretti
reviews.comment: This speaker is a piece of art. The glass glow looks stunning at night and the acoustic dispersion means it sounds great in any spot.

name: Oravox Hearth
description: Audiophile-grade active bookshelf speakers with hand-crafted walnut veneer cabinets, integrated high-end DAC, and powerful Class-D amplification.
features: Genuine handcrafted walnut wood cabinets optimized for thermal acoustics
Integrated audiophile 24-bit/192kHz digital-to-analog converter
Dedicated bi-amplified Class-D output system per channel
Broad inputs including Bluetooth aptX HD, optical, and coaxial digital
Rear-firing custom-tuned bass reflex port for low-end reinforcement

specs.Inputs: Optical, Coaxial Digital, RCA Stereo, USB-Audio, Bluetooth

reviews.name: Thomas Sterling
reviews.comment: Superb dynamic range. Vocal imaging is dead-center. Using these as a minimalist desktop setup and they are worth every single penny.

name: Oravox Skiff
description: Studio-quality USB condenser microphone with zero-latency headphone monitoring, four selectable polar patterns, and a sleek modern desktop stand.
features: Custom triple 14mm condenser capsule array for immaculate recording
Four recording patterns: Cardioid, Stereo, Omnidirectional, Bidirectional
Built-in zero-latency 3.5mm real-time headphone monitoring output
Smooth hardware microphone gain adjustments and instant silent mute button
Heavyweight solid aluminum stand with integrated shock-isolation dampening

reviews.name: Emily Watson
reviews.comment: My podcast listeners noticed the sound quality difference immediately. Crystal clear capture and the gain dial is very solid.

name: Oravox Anchor
description: Extreme-power portable outdoor party speaker featuring deep chest-thumping bass, synchronised dynamic ring lights, and an IPX4 splash-proof construction.
features: Colossal 120W acoustic power stage for large outdoor events
Dynamic dual LED halo rings synced to the rhythm of your audio
Up to 18 hours of continuous battery life with reverse powerbank out
IPX4 splashproof certified housing with heavy duty handle
Dedicated 1/4-inch instrument and microphone inputs with hardware gain control

specs.Drivers: 2 x 5.25-inch Woofers + 2 x 2-inch Custom Dome Tweeters
specs.Inputs: Bluetooth, 3.5mm Aux-In, USB-Media, 2 x 1/4" Instrument Jack

reviews.name: Alex Mercer
reviews.comment: This speaker is a beast! The bass actually shakes the floor, and the light rings make it feel like a club. Very solid build.
